top_signals.title: ECB’s Schnabel Sees Risk of Unanchored Inflation Views From War - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: ECB’s Schnabel Sees Risk of Unanchored Inflation Views From War  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: France Boards Another Tanker Tied to Russian Oil Trade
top_signals.summary: France’s navy boarded another oil tanker on the high seas after it sailed from Russia, the latest move in a global crackdown on shadow-fleet vessels used to export sanctioned crude.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: SoftBank plans 75 billion euros of AI investments in France, as Europe struggles to catch up with U.S. and China
top_signals.summary: The Japanese tech giant plans to develop and operate 5 GW of AI data center capacity in France, with an initial 3.1 GW of facilities in the country's north.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Israel Expands Operation in Lebanon
top_signals.summary: Israel expanded its ground assault in Lebanon with its broadest incursion into the country in a quarter-century as Hezbollah stepped up attacks on Israel’s north. On Sunday, Defense Minister Israel Katz said the IDF had planted a flag on the historic Beaufort castle near Nabatieh, and that the expansion amounted to “a permanent presence” in the region. Bloomberg's Dana Khraiche reports. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Goldman Sachs Sees Oil Demand Destruction Offsetting Supply Shock Risks
top_signals.summary: Demand destruction resulting from higher prices will somewhat soften the blow from physically tighter oil markets, Goldman Sachs commodity analysts said in a note. “We see significant upside price risks from potentially more persistent Mideast supply losses but also meaningful price downside from weaker demand,” the team said, as quoted by Bloomberg. “Actual end-use oil demand may have fallen more in response to higher prices than expected.” The investment bank’s analysts estimate that the extent of demand destruction…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: European defense stocks are cooling off after the military spending boom. Here's what's next
top_signals.summary: Analysts see 2026 as a period of consolidation for the sector, as excitement over Europe's increased defense budget is replaced by company-specific drivers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
